settings.heading: Get your offer within 24h
settings.subtitle: Complete bikes and components. We respond within 24 business hours.
settings.step_2_title: Get a firm offer in 48 hours
settings.step_3_title: Ship it free, get paid fast

settings.title: Complete bikes
settings.description: Road, gravel, cyclocross, triathlon & TT. All major brands.

settings.title: Framesets
settings.description: Carbon & aluminum. Disc and rim. No crash damage or structural repairs.

settings.title: Wheelsets
settings.description: Carbon & alloy. Zipp, ENVE, Roval, DT Swiss and more.

settings.title: Groupsets
settings.description: Shimano, SRAM, Campagnolo. Di2, eTap, EPS, mechanical.

settings.title: Components
settings.description: Cockpit, power meters, saddles, seatposts. ENVE, Fizik, Quarq, PRO.

settings.title: What we don't accept:
settings.description:
MTB, BMX, e-bikes, kids bikes, no-name brands, severely damaged or modified frames, and gear with missing components.

Not sure? Submit anyway — we'll let you know within 24 hours.

settings.label: WHAT WE ACCEPT
settings.heading: We buy performance gear
settings.subtitle: Road, gravel, and triathlon. Complete bikes, frames, wheels, groupsets, and components from major brands. If it's high-end and rideable, we want it.

settings.label: PAYOUT OPTIONS
settings.heading: Cash or store credit — your call
settings.subtitle: Get paid fast either way. Store credit gets you up to 15% more — use it toward your next upgrade.
settings.cash_subtitle: Direct deposit or check · 3–5 business days after receipt
settings.cash_description: We send a firm offer before you ship anything. Accept it, pack your gear — we send the label.
settings.credit_subtitle: Up to 15% more than the cash offer
settings.credit_description: Same process, higher payout. Credit applied instantly once we receive your gear.
settings.step_1_desc: Takes 2 minutes. No shipping until you accept.
settings.step_2_title: Get a firm offer within 24 hours
settings.step_2_desc: No lowball after you ship. Price is locked.
settings.step_3_desc: Free shipping. We handle insurance too.
settings.step_4_title: Get paid within 3–5 days of receipt
settings.step_4_desc: Cash or store credit — whichever you chose.

settings.step1_subtitle: Add each item you want to sell. We'll send you a firm offer within 24 hours.
settings.step2_subtitle: We'll send your offer to the email below. Usually within 24 hours.
settings.consent_text: I confirm this gear is mine to sell. View full terms — we keep it simple.
settings.done_subtitle: You'll hear from us within the next 24h via email with a firm offer. No lowballs, no games.
settings.done_step_1_desc: We'll email your offer within 24 hours
settings.done_step_2_desc: Our team reviews condition, market value, and demand
settings.done_step_3_desc: Lock in your price — no changes after acceptance
settings.done_step_4_desc: We send the label. Payment within 3–5 days of receipt.
settings.disclaimer_text: Your info is never shared or sold. We respond within 1 business day.
